description_long: This object is a classic chessboard set on a thick, rectangular base with a smooth, brown border. The playing surface features a standard 8x8 grid of alternating black and white squares, each sharply defined and evenly spaced. The chessboard is fully populated with two sets of chess pieces, one in white and the other in black, arranged in their traditional starting positions. The pieces are stylized with clear differentiation between pawns, rooks, knights, bishops, queens, and kings, each set mirroring the other across the board. The border is wide, flat, and unadorned, providing a sturdy frame for the playing area. The overall appearance is clean and modern, with a focus on functionality and visual clarity.
description: A classic chessboard with a thick brown border and a standard 8x8 grid of alternating black and white squares, fully set up with black and white chess pieces. The design is clean, modern, and highly functional.
description_view_0: The chessboard is viewed from the black side, showing all black pieces in the foreground and white pieces in the background, with the brown border framing the board.
description_view_1: The chessboard is viewed from the white side, highlighting the white pieces in the foreground and the black pieces in the background, with the brown border clearly visible.
description_view_2: The chessboard is viewed from the left side, displaying both sets of pieces in profile and emphasizing the alternating pattern of the squares.
description_view_3: The chessboard is viewed from the right side, showing the black pieces in the foreground and the white pieces in the background, with the brown border prominent.
attribute_board_pattern: The playing surface consists of a regular grid of 64 squares arranged in an 8x8 matrix, with alternating black and white squares forming a classic checkerboard pattern. Each square is perfectly square-shaped, and the pattern is sharply defined with no decorative elements or inscriptions.
attribute_border_design: The border is a wide, flat, and unadorned band in a medium brown color, made to resemble wood. It is smooth, with no visible ornamentation, inscriptions, or markings, and frames the playing area evenly on all sides.
